name: Sherlock Holmes — Paget Originals
author: Storyplay
license: Public Domain — Sidney Paget illustrations originally published in The Strand Magazine, 1891-1908.

art.notes: Sidney Paget's original Strand Magazine illustrations, drawn by Doyle's contemporary specifically for these stories. Canonical reference for Holmes' visual identity (deerstalker, Inverness cape, hawk-nosed profile).

description: Pairs Conan Doyle's text with Sidney Paget's original Strand Magazine illustrations — the canonical visual reference for Holmes, drawn for the actual scenes. The pack proves the system: public-domain art chosen by humans, no AI involved.
